blended.narrative: White Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 30 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,530 ft. Looking ahead, 37 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 23" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 8" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 29.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 15" over the past week. Current depth: 67".
